author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

CORE Episode 2 Covers and Early Access Out Now

Morale may be down for Gyun and Moda, but their journey is far from over.

Get early access to Star Atlas CORE Episode 2 by purchasing exclusive covers now at our Galactic Marketplace and Magic Eden! 

Collect the covers from all episodes to discover the Key of Iris & win incredible prizes! 

• Star Atlas Cover - https://play.staratlas.com/market?category=story
• Magic Eden Cover - https://magiceden.io/launchpad/star_atlas_episode_2
